seoTitle: Wellington Park vs Wesley Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellington Park and Wesley Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wellington Park vs Wesley Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellington Park and Wesley Vale.
heading: Wellington Park vs Wesley Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellington Park, Tasmania and Wesley Vale, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellington Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wesley Vale (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellington Park or Wesley Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellington Park has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Wesley Vale scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellington Park scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Wesley Vale scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellington Park or Wesley Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellington Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
